overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game, showing a cowboy character walking through a historic frontier town with wooden boardwalks, horse-drawn carriages, and period architecture. The character moves along covered sidewalks past various storefronts including a soda shop and the Jade Dragon Restaurant, with a tram passing by in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden boardwalk with canvas awning

events.description: exits the covered walkway into open sunlight on the main boardwalk
approaches a group of pedestrians walking along the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk, emerging from the covered walkway into the open street

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople in period clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green and white striped canvas roof covering the walkway
empty wooden cart with large wheels parked on the boardwalk
storefront with blue painted walls and red trim, checkerboard floor visible at entrance
black iron poles supporting the canvas awning overhead

segments.scene_description: The character begins under a covered walkway with a striped canvas awning, walking along a wooden boardwalk. As they emerge into open sunlight, a blue soda shop facade becomes visible on the left, and the character approaches a group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with tram tracks and horse-drawn traffic

events.description: electric tram approaches and passes by on the right side of the street
horse-drawn carriage moves along the dirt street parallel to the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the boardwalk as a tram passes by on the adjacent street, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: electric tram moving along tracks parallel to the boardwalk
horse-drawn carriage with white horses traveling down the dirt street

entered.detail: vintage streetcar with multiple windows moving along metal tracks
large wooden building with a clock tower and green roof
wooden slatted benches along the edge of the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open boardwalk as an electric tram passes by on the right. A train station building with a clock tower dominates the background, while horse-drawn carriages move along the dirt street. The blue soda shop recedes into the mid-ground as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boardwalk with storefronts and open market area

events.description: passing open market area with wooden stalls and barricades
navigates through denser pedestrian traffic on the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts including a tailor shop, passing by a large street clock and market stalls

notable_agents.action: man leaning against the building wall near the tailor shop

entered.detail: hanging metal sign with a black cat silhouette marking a tailor and surgeon shop
large circular clock mounted on a black iron pole
covered market area with green canvas roofing and wooden crates
triangular wooden barriers placed along the edge of the boardwalk
white painted building with shuttered windows and a balcony

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the commercial boardwalk, passing a black cat tavern sign and a large street clock. Wooden barricades line the edge of the walkway near an open market area with green canvas stalls. Pedestrians move in various directions as the character approaches a two-story white building.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with wrought iron balconies and restaurant signage

events.description: enters narrower covered walkway with overhead restaurant sign
moves into deeper shadow cast by the surrounding buildings and covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrower corridor toward the Jade Dragon Restaurant, passing under covered walkways with hanging plants

notable_agents.action: woman in a long dress and hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large red rectangular sign with white text reading JADE DRAGON RESTAURANT spanning the alley
decorative black iron railings on the second floor of the building
potted plants hanging from the balcony railings
tight corridor between buildings with covered walkway overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower, more enclosed alleyway with the prominent red Jade Dragon Restaurant sign overhead. Wrought iron balconies with hanging plants line the right side of the corridor, while the lighting shifts to deeper shadows under the covered walkway. The character passes a woman in period dress as they move deeper into the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling frontier town that transitions from a bright, open commercial boardwalk into a shadowed, narrow alleyway. It begins under a striped canvas awning, moving out into the sunlight past a blue soda shop facade and a group of oncoming pedestrians. As the character progresses, the scene expands to reveal an electric tram passing by a distant clock tower and horse-drawn carriages on a dirt street. The camera then glides past a black cat tavern sign and green market stalls before turning away from the open square toward a two-story white building. Finally, the environment shifts into a more enclosed corridor under the red Jade Dragon Restaurant sign, where the lighting deepens into shadow beneath wrought iron balconies and hanging plants.
